summary: Introduce a consensus handoff protocol + tooling so agents blocked from the bus can record actionable receipts.

steps.title: Capture requirements + failure mode
steps.notes: Documented the guard recursion / bus access deadlock plus the receipt requirements tying pending action, branch, and next steps.

steps.title: Author automation spec
steps.notes: Added docs/automation/consensus-handoff.md covering workflow, CLI usage, and guardrails for emitting receipts under _report/analysis/.

steps.title: Implement CLI + regression test
steps.notes: Implemented tools.automation.consensus_handoff plus pytest coverage verifying receipt/pointer emission.

checkpoint.description: Consensus handoff receipts are documented, implemented, and tested.
